description_long: This object is a pumpkin-shaped item with a segmented, faceted surface and a distressed orange finish, giving it a rugged, metallic appearance. The front features a classic jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, all cut out sharply. At the top, there is a green, metallic stem that resembles the lever and safety pin of a hand grenade, complete with a ring and handle. The surface shows signs of wear, with black scuff marks and scratches distributed across the orange panels. The overall form is round and squat, with the grenade-like stem and handle adding a unique, industrial twist to the traditional pumpkin motif. The object appears hollow, as indicated by the cutouts and the construction of the stem.
description: A rugged, orange pumpkin with a jack-o'-lantern face and a green grenade-style stem and handle, featuring distressed textures and cutouts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, jagged mouth, and the green grenade-style stem and handle.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the segmented orange surface and the green stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the faceted pumpkin body and the full profile of the green handle and stem.
description_view_3: Direct side view showing the handle and stem in profile, with the pumpkin's segmented surface and no facial features visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth cut out in a geometric style. The surface is segmented and faceted, with distressed paint and black scuff marks for a worn effect.
